summary: Frontend-only regression on Davy Levy Link-in-Bio: verified reel-link swap (17062026v1), new 19/07 card, and per-video tools isolation for slugs 17062026v1, 18072026v1, 19072026v1. BUG FIX 1 and new 19/07 card fully working. Isolated tools pages pass 100%. BUG FIX 2 is NOT applied — /18072026v1 still renders the disabled 'Vídeo em breve' button because /app/frontend/src/data/videos.js still has href='' for id 'dinheiro-para-receber'; expected active <a> pointing to https://www.instagram.com/reel/Da8p_uPK39E/?igsh=dzVjemJ3Z2d0cm80.

ui_bugs.issue: Watch button is still disabled '<button> Vídeo em breve' (no href). Expected active <a> with href='https://www.instagram.com/reel/Da8p_uPK39E/?igsh=dzVjemJ3Z2d0cm80'. Data file /app/frontend/src/data/videos.js line ~593 still has href: "".

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/data/videos.js, update the 'dinheiro-para-receber' entry (slug 18072026v1) so that href = 'https://www.instagram.com/reel/Da8p_uPK39E/?igsh=dzVjemJ3Z2d0cm80'. This will convert the disabled button to an active 'Assistir ao Vídeo' <a> on /18072026v1 and on the /videos listing (Renda Extra tab). No other files should need changes; VideoCard.jsx and Ferramentas.jsx are already correct.
critical_code_review_comments: videos.js is a single 665-line data file — acceptable given it's static content, but consider splitting per-category into separate files if it grows beyond ~1000 lines.

In Ferramentas.jsx, `data-testid` for tools uses tool name; names containing spaces/parentheses like 'Pinion (iOS)' produce test-ids like 'ferramenta-pinion-(ios)'. Works in Playwright but is fragile; consider slugifying (strip parentheses) to get 'ferramenta-pinion-ios'.

Ferramentas.jsx uses `video.tools.map((t) => <ToolButton key={t.name} ...>)` — key is unique inside a single video but be careful if two tools ever share a name across different videos (not an issue today).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only /18072026v1 remains failing. After main agent updates the 'dinheiro-para-receber' href in /app/frontend/src/data/videos.js, retest by visiting https://link-in-bio-7.preview.emergentagent.com/18072026v1 and asserting [data-testid="watch-dinheiro-para-receber"] is an <a> with the Da8p_uPK39E URL. Everything else (17062026v1 active reel Da6JcaNqGa1, /19072026v1 disabled + access-tools link, and all three /ferramentas/ pages isolated correctly with expected button counts 5/1/3) already passes and does not need re-testing unless data.js changes affect them.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: 18072026v1 'Assistir ao Vídeo' still disabled instead of linking to the corrected Instagram reel.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The data update for the 18/07 card was not applied. /app/frontend/src/data/videos.js still has `href: ""` for the object with id 'dinheiro-para-receber' (Renda Extra category, slug 18072026v1). VideoCard.jsx correctly renders a disabled 'Vídeo em breve' <button> whenever `video.href` is falsy — so the rendered UI is a symptom of missing data, not a component bug.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: Load https://link-in-bio-7.preview.emergentagent.com/18072026v1 → the button reads 'Vídeo em breve' and is a <button> without href. Same on /videos → Renda Extra tab, card 'VOCÊ TEM DINHEIRO PARA RECEBER AGORA MESMO'.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Set href of the 'dinheiro-para-receber' object in /app/frontend/src/data/videos.js to 'https://www.instagram.com/reel/Da8p_uPK39E/?igsh=dzVjemJ3Z2d0cm80'. No further code changes needed.
